creator: ports@christianserving.org
text:
On Aug 19, 2010, at 1:47 PM, Bernhard Froehlich wrote:

> Sorry for the delay but 4 weeks have passed since you submitted the
> patch so I want to set EXPIRATION_DATE to 2010-10-01 if that is okay
> with you. And could you please tell me the reason why people should
> upgrade to 1.8?


Yeah, that's fine.  Way back when I submitted it, Sept. 1 was =
sufficient.  ;-)

As for why, 1.8 has been out for many months now, and no development is =
being done on the 1.6 branch anymore.  When 1.8 was first released, I =
wanted to make it available through ports, but I recognized that some =
users may not have wanted to upgrade right away while some of the bugs =
were shaken out.  So, the zabbix16* ports were created for those users.
